title: orobus bauhini
intro: Orobus bauhini, also known as kidney vetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is commonly found in Europe and Asia, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting kidney function. In herbal preparations, Orobus bauhini is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
